tools.name: jwt

tools.name: kv

tools.name: chunk
tools.description: token-aware text splitter - JSONL chunks within a token budget

tools.name: grab

tools.name: jsonl

tools.name: links

tools.name: plain

tools.name: validate
tools.description: JSONL schema validator - --schema, --strict, --fix, --json

tools.name: mask
tools.description: secret redactor - entropy + pattern-based, streaming

tools.name: emit
tools.description: structured logger - wraps stdin lines as JSONL log records

tools.name: throttle
tools.description: rate limiter for pipes - --rate N/s or N/m

tools.name: digest
tools.description: universal hasher - sha256/md5/sha512, --hmac, --compare

tools.name: base
tools.description: encoding converter - base64, base64url, hex, base32

tools.name: recase
tools.description: naming convention converter - snake, camel, kebab, pascal, title

tools.name: slug
tools.description: URL/filename slug generator - --separator, --max, --json

tools.name: moniker
tools.description: memorable name generator - run IDs, job labels, temp dirs

tools.name: pct

tools.name: sip

tools.name: urlinfo
tools.description: URL parser - scheme, host, port, path, query, --field

tools.name: assert
tools.description: pipeline condition check - jq conditions, --contains, --matches

tools.name: bare

tools.name: completions
